Who We Are

Bridging Needs
with Care

At SETU Hyderabad, help has no boundaries — we believe support should reach every individual with dignity and care.

Est.
2026
🏛

SETU Hyderabad is a community welfare and support centre for all communities — helping people through healthcare, elder care, essential services and donation support. We welcome everyone, regardless of background.

"Every helping hand builds a stronger community."

Operated under the R.C. Valani Charitable Trust (DARPAN ID: TS/2026/1025927), located at Ground Floor, Sukoon Aashiyana, H. # 5-8-505/A/2/2, Chirag Ali Ln, Opp. Jamatkhana, Abids, Hyderabad – 500001.

🏥 Healthcare 🧘 Physiotherapy 👴 Elder Care 📄 Documents 🤝 Donations 🌍 All Communities
🌟 FREE OF COST
Healthcare Support

Healing Without Cost,
Care Without Limits

Because comfort and care should never be expensive.

📅
Every Monday & Tuesday
Free physiotherapy sessions held twice a week
🕙
10:00 AM – 12:00 PM
Morning sessions, no appointment needed
💪
Improve Mobility & Reduce Pain
Professional support for better well-being and daily comfort
🏠
Walk-in Welcome
Open to all — no paperwork, no cost, no barriers
Wellness Devices

Relief, Comfort
& Better Living

"Small care today creates healthier tomorrows."

1
Acupressure Devices
Targeted pressure point therapy for pain relief and improved circulation
2
Pain Relief Devices
Electric and manual devices to ease joint and muscle pain
3
Elder Wellness Support
Gentle therapies designed for seniors and those with limited mobility
4
Treadmill & Fitness
Light exercise equipment available for general fitness and recovery
⚠️
Important: Only 2 therapies per day to avoid discomfort. Please eat 30 minutes before or after any treatment session.
